children.heading: Board of Regents
children.label: 1 Board of Regents
children.text: The term “Board of Regents” means the Board of Regents of the Smithsonian Institution.

children.heading: Council
children.label: 2 Council
children.text: The term “Council” means the National Museum of African American History and Culture Council established by .section 80r–3 of this title

children.heading: Museum
children.label: 3 Museum
children.text: The term “Museum” means the National Museum of African American History and Culture established by .section 80r–2 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Smithsonian Institution.
